title: galium aparine var. scaberrimum
intro: Galium aparine var. scaberrimum, also known as stickyweed or goosegrass, is a variant of the Galium aparine plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Galium aparine var. scaberrimum include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and relieving symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. The herbal preparations of Galium aparine var. scaberrimum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
